name: DaVinci Complete Slumber Crib & Toddler Mattress, Greenguard Gold Certified
description:
The DaVinci Complete Slumber Waterproof Crib & Toddler Mattress is designed with layers of high-density fiber for a firm sleeping surface that is GREENGUARD Gold certified and 100% non-toxic, so your baby can sleep safely and comfortably. This mattress features a waterproof, tear-resistant cover that will stay new through years of use.

With over 25 years of experience outfitting nurseries, we at DaVinci knew what we wanted out of crib mattresses: GREENGUARD Gold Certified waterproof mattresses that’s extra safe and comfortable for baby and makes cleaning easy – all at an affordable price. Thus, we’ve made a lot of strides to improve on our award-winning mattresses, so that no parent has to compromise on safe sleep and peace of mind for the whole family. All DaVinci mattresses are free of vinyl and chemical flame retardants. We offer a sleeping surface that is waterproof, tear-resistant and easy-to-clean. A non-crinkly cover provides quiet comfort and side air vents allow fresh air circulation to prevent mold from growing under the surface.
